title: Rebuild UK Release
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild UK Release?             Quote Post by Eternally Lost Zeppo » Mon Dec 08, 2008 7:32 am I'm assuming it will happen at some point, but I was wondering if anyone has heard anything concrete, like a Region 2 release date or anything like that?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Dec 08, 2008 7:40 am A Region 2 release has already happened, just not in your country.

[]:             Quote Post by Eternally Lost Zeppo » Mon Dec 08, 2008 7:52 am Reichu wrote: A Region 2 release has already happened, just not in your country.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Dec 08, 2008 1:33 pm Eternally Lost Zeppo wrote: Hmm...if only I could read or understand German.

[]:             Quote Post by Eternally Lost Zeppo » Mon Dec 08, 2008 7:29 pm Mr. Tines wrote: There's always Japanese (also R2).

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Dec 09, 2008 2:03 am Eternally Lost Zeppo wrote: Is that with English subtitles?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 09, 2008 2:49 am There are none.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Tue Dec 09, 2008 3:38 pm well the Australian dvd has english subtitles doesnt it?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 09, 2008 3:45 pm It's Region 4, though.
